listings.desc: Upgraded 4th-floor corner unit at Merritt Towers overlooks Sykes Creek and Newfound Harbor. Remodeled kitchen and baths, oak hardwood floors, enclosed balcony. HOA covers cable, internet, water, trash, insurance and grounds.

Stunning 3BR corner/end unit with direct water views of Sykes Creek. Gigantic wrap-around balcony, remodeled kitchen with granite counters, plantation shutters, tile floors throughout. HVAC 2024, covered carport.

MOTIVATED SELLER! Welcome to Merritt Towers, a highly sought-after gated waterfront community centrally located on the Space Coast. From the moment you enter, panoramic views of Sykes Creek/Newfound Harbor. Enjoy a front row seat to rocket launches, cruise ships, dolphins & boaters. Watch the sunrise sipping your coffee on your private all-season balcony. Spacious primary bedroom with access to balcony, en suite bathroom featuring double sinks and walk-in closet. Assigned carport. Walk to Merritt Island mall, bank, restaurants, new Health First Hospital being built nearby. New Amphitheatre. 2 waterfront pools. North pool heated year round. Main Clubhouse with full kitchen & activities. Tennis/pickleball/shuffleboard. Dog Park, Walking Pier. EZ drive to SpaceX, Blue Origin, Port, KSC, Beaches, Cocoa Village.
